description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 1, 2026 at 5:12 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Burlingame, California made contact 
with the pavement in a parking lot driveway entrance on Mitten Road near Old Bayshore Highway. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Mitten Road and began to turn left at the parking lot driveway entrance at 1799 Old 
Bayshore Highway when the underside of the Waymo AV made contact with the pavement. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present in the driver’s seating position. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage. 
Print
Clear Form
